retrieved_result: French launch \"massive\" anti-ISIS airstrikes in Syria. Last Updated Nov 15, 2015 10:58 PM EST Paris - Two days after the deadly terror attacks in Paris that left at least 129 people dead and 352 injured, a French defense official says they have conducted \"massive\" airstrikes that have destroyed two jihadi sites in the Islamic State of Iraq and Syria
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result concerns military actions against ISIS, not software development, IDEs, or programming tools.
